caption: A man with blond hair, wearing glasses, a blue button-down shirt, and large white over-ear headphones, sits in front of a microphone. He is positioned in a room with light-colored wooden paneled walls. Behind him is a framed monitor displaying a screen with the number "20" visible. To the left, a decorated Christmas tree with multicolored lights is partially visible. Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking and smiling, showing his teeth. His facial expression shifts from an open-mouthed speaking posture to a wide smile and then back to speaking. He remains centered in the shot, and his posture stays consistent as he interacts with someone off-screen. The lighting remains steady across the scene, highlighting the textures of his clothing and the metallic sheen of the headphones.
